title: Build a Generics-based Accordion
description: Create a reusable, highly flexible accordion component in React using TypeScript generics for the item data. Must include toggle animation, proper typing, and support custom headers.

title: Implementing Redux-like Custom Hook
description: Write a custom React hook that mimics useReducer but integrates a simple middleware logging system for debugging state transitions.

title: Create a High-Fidelity Mobile Landing Page
description: Design a complete checkout landing page for a mobile food delivery app. Build a comprehensive design system featuring 4 button states, typographic hierarchy, and custom SVG illustrations.

title: Regression Analysis on Housing Data
description: Load the provided housing dataset using Pandas, perform basic feature engineering, and train a Linear Regression model using scikit-learn. Write a 2-page notebook describing the MSE results.
